title: xylophacos coccineus
intro: Xylophacos coccineus, also known as the 'Red Flowered Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Xylophacos coccineus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Xylophacos coccineus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
